response.justification: The candidate is a capable senior generalist with strong TypeScript/Node.js and DLang background, but the role requires 8 years of C++ experience and substantial large-scale cloud compute platform work. The resume shows only ~7 months of C/C++ at National Instruments plus a bachelor thesis, and no production cloud compute platform leadership. Core technical requirements are not met.
strengths: Long track record of senior IC work across diverse stacks and domains
Experience with high-throughput services at Sociomantic (millions of HTTP req/s)
Demonstrated mentoring, workshops, and community teaching activity
concerns: Far below the 8-year C++ requirement — only brief C/C++ exposure at National Instruments
No production cloud compute platform or large-scale distributed cloud architecture experience
No formal technical leadership role mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers

key_factors.factor: Lack of cloud compute platform background
